description: NPM Audit Exception Configuration - Documents accepted security vulnerabilities with mitigation strategies

xlsx.reason: No fix available on npm. Latest version 0.18.5 has known vulnerabilities. Fixes exist in 0.19.3+ but SheetJS does not publish to npm (only available via CDN).
mitigation: xlsx only used in read-excel.tool.ts for controlled Excel file reading
Path validation and access control checks enforce security boundaries
File size limits (100MB max) prevent DoS attacks
Only processes user-provided files with explicit permission
No arbitrary code execution paths exposed
Running in Electron main process with sandboxed renderer

vulnerabilities.title: SheetJS Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS)

alternatives: exceljs - More actively maintained, better security track record
node-xlsx - Simpler library with fewer features but fewer vulnerabilities
SheetJS Pro - Commercial version with security fixes (not published to npm)
actionItems: Monitor npm for xlsx updates monthly
Consider migrating to exceljs if vulnerabilities escalate
